title: Henbrandt 1 x Children’s Alien Catapult Slingshot with Two Aliens Sticky Toy Target Practice Rubber Novelty Party Bag Favours Loot Bag Stocking Fillers for Boys and Girls
features: Single Alien Catapult sticky toy for kids.

These sticky alien slingshot toys are out of this world, and they make fantastic party favours, loot bag fillers, pocket money toys, classroom gifts, Christmas stocking fillers, small gifts, lucky dip prizes, and more.

Each catapult set comes in a blister pack and includes 2 stretchy sticky aliens and 1 catapult handle. There are two colour combinations available: Red and Green Aliens with a Yellow Catapult; or Blue and Yellow Aliens with a Green Catapult.
description: Product description These sticky alien catapult toys are fantastic party bag fillers, class rewards and teacher gifts for children, novelty presents, pocket money toys, Christmas stocking fillers, and more. Behold the colourful little aliens who have travelled far across the stars and have ended up stuck on Planet Earth! Luckily for these sticky little guys, their over-sized hands make them a perfect fit for a slingshot, so they are looking for a helpful human accomplice who can assist them in returning to their home planet by shooting them back into outer space. The alien catapult toys are easy to use, simply slot the aliens into the catapult handle, pull them back, aim, and release! Once you have fitted the alien into the slingshot, aim high and try and help the colourful extraterrestrials back to their home planet. There are two colour combinations available: Red and Green Aliens with a Yellow Catapult; or Blue and Yellow Aliens with a Green Catapult. Each alien measures approx. 7cm / 2.75inch, and as they are individually packed in blister packs the sticky alien catapult toys are perfect party prizes and novelty gifts. Please be advised: These sticky toys can leave marks on walls and ceilings. Furthermore, when releasing the slingshot toys, do not aim at people. Single pack Alien Catapult toy in a blister pack per order. One colour combination will be sent at random. Recommended for ages 3+ and adult supervision is recommended. This product carries the UKCA mark and is compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements. Safety Warning WARNING! Choking hazard, Small parts. Staining Risk Adult supervision is recommended.
